creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On CURRENT host, hosting 13-STABLE jails for poudriere, building security/openvas in a 13-stable jail fails due to:

[...]
===>  Building for openvas-22.4.1
[  1% 8/86] /usr/bin/cc -DOPENVAS_DATA_DIR=\"/usr/local/share/openvas\" -DOPENVAS_FEED_LOCK_PATH=\"/var/lib/openvas/feed-update.lock\" -DOPENVAS_MISC_VERSION=\"22.4.1\" -DOPENVAS_STATE_DIR=\"/var/lib/openvas\" -DOPENVAS_SYSCONF_DIR=\"/usr/local/etc/openvas\" -Dopenvas_misc_shared_EXPORTS -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/json-glib-1.0 -I/usr/local/include/gvm -I/usr/local/include/p11-kit-1 -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -DLARGEFILE_SOURCE=1                                 -std=c11                                 -Wall                                 -Wextra                                 -Werror                                 -Wpedantic                                 -Wmissing-prototypes                                 -Wshadow                                 -Wsequence-point                                 -D_BSD_SOURCE                                 -D_ISOC11_SOURCE                                 -D_SVID_SOURCE                                 -D_DEFAULT_SOURCE -Wall -Wextra -fPIC -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing  -DNDEBUG -Wformat -Wformat-security -fPIC -MD -MT misc/CMakeFiles/openvas_misc_shared.dir/scan_id.c.o -MF misc/CMakeFiles/openvas_misc_shared.dir/scan_id.c.o.d -o misc/CMakeFiles/openvas_misc_shared.dir/scan_id.c.o -c /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/openvas/work/openvas-scanner-22.4.1/misc/scan_id.c
FAILED: misc/CMakeFiles/openvas_misc_shared.dir/scan_id.c.o 
/usr/bin/cc -DOPENVAS_DATA_DIR=\"/usr/local/share/openvas\" -DOPENVAS_FEED_LOCK_PATH=\"/var/lib/openvas/feed-update.lock\" -DOPENVAS_MISC_VERSION=\"22.4.1\" -DOPENVAS_STATE_DIR=\"/var/lib/openvas\" -DOPENVAS_SYSCONF_DIR=\"/usr/local/etc/openvas\" -Dopenvas_misc_shared_EXPORTS -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/json-glib-1.0 -I/usr/local/include/gvm -I/usr/local/include/p11-kit-1 -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -DLARGEFILE_SOURCE=1                                 -std=c11                                 -Wall                                 -Wextra                                 -Werror                                 -Wpedantic                                 -Wmissing-prototypes                                 -Wshadow                                 -Wsequence-point                                 -D_BSD_SOURCE                                 -D_ISOC11_SOURCE                                 -D_SVID_SOURCE                                 -D_DEFAULT_SOURCE -Wall -Wextra -fPIC -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing  -DNDEBUG -Wformat -Wformat-security -fPIC -MD -MT misc/CMakeFiles/openvas_misc_shared.dir/scan_id.c.o -MF misc/CMakeFiles/openvas_misc_shared.dir/scan_id.c.o.d -o misc/CMakeFiles/openvas_misc_shared.dir/scan_id.c.o -c /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/openvas/work/openvas-scanner-22.4.1/misc/scan_id.c
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/openvas/work/openvas-scanner-22.4.1/misc/scan_id.c:36:13: error: a function declaration without a prototype is deprecated in all versions of C [-Werror,-Wstrict-prototypes]
get_scan_id ()
            ^
             void
1 error generated.
[...]
